params.name: Map Configurations
params.desc: Setup troop spawn on map

params.name: Default Character Image
params.desc: Image used for character when none specified

params.name: Default Character Index
params.desc: Image used for character when none specified

params.name: Enemy Placement Positions
params.desc: Setup enemy positioning.

params.name: Retain Enemies
params.desc: Resets enemies only when the map is changed.

params.name: Position X
params.desc: X - position of this index

params.name: Position Y
params.desc: Y - position of this index

params.name: Name
params.desc: No function

params.name: Event
params.desc: Call common event instead of normal battle

params.name: No Kill
params.desc: Prevent event from dying by event trigger and set respawn timer.

params.name: Enemies
params.desc: Enemies that can be included in the troop

params.name: Victory Event
params.desc: Common event to play if the battle ends in victory.

params.name: Defeat Event
params.desc: Common event to play if the battle ends in defeat.

params.name: Can Escape
params.desc: Allow player to escape troop

params.name: Can Lose
params.desc: Allow player to lose to troop

params.name: Minimal Number
params.desc: Least amount of enemies in troop

params.name: Maximum Number
params.desc: Max amount of enemies in troop

params.name: Character File
params.desc: Character file used to represent troop

params.name: Character File Index
params.desc: Image graphic index (For 8 character sheet)

params.name: Move Speed
params.desc: Speed of the troop

params.name: Move Frequency
params.desc: How frequent event will move

params.name: Near Balloon
params.desc: Balloon to play when near

params.name: Detect Range
params.desc: Number of tiles for detect range

params.name: Detect Action
params.desc: Action to take if player is near

params.name: Name
params.desc: No function

params.name: Map
params.desc: ID of the map

params.name: Troops
params.desc: Setup potential troops

params.name: Maximum Number
params.desc: Max amount of troops on map.

params.name: Spawn Regions
params.desc: Regions in which enemy can spawn
